ticker: Join the new Bass Station group! https://vrc.group/BASS.2844
Live DJs and music every other Friday!
Any attempts by fishing obsessed creatures to catch our resident shark will result in being made to locate and then clean the toilets.

performers.name: LINKUS
ticker: Please welcome our first DJ of the night and new to the Bass Station, LINKUS!
'9 out of 10 doctors agree, Linkus is awesome. the other doctor is a big nerd.'

performers.name: E-Meow
ticker: 'Please remember to use proper safety equipment around the speakers. This includes Eye Protection.'
